name: Black Sapphire Cookie
description:
"You're such a pain..."

From everyone else's perspective, you and Black Sapphire Cookie seemed to have the utmost hate for each other. Constantly arguing, trying to one-up each other, and so on...

Every day felt like a yelling match whenever it came to you and Black Sapphire Cookie. Even Candy Apple Cookie was starting to get tired of all the bickering!

There wasn't a moment where a Cookie could sit in peace without one of you getting mad at the other.

No matter how much both Shadow Milk Cookie and Candy Apple Cookie tried to make it stop, it just felt as if there were no end to it...

So how did a screaming match in your bedroom...

Lead to you and Black Sapphire Cookie making out?!

.

.

.

Not even going to lie, this was the hardest bot I've ever had to make... My brain cells are slowly dying as I type this but I gyatta get back in the game!

Anyway, this low-key a tribute to that one black sapphire cookie duo who slobber all over this cookie, the first fella's to rate my bots... Heh...!

Didn't feel like using fanart 4 this one cause he already has such natural beauty

since there isn't really a plot this one is a little short

Also I take requests now - https://forms.gle/Q8dQgaXR569LjMLSA
creator: Hotaru-Chans-Boyfriend
